opportunityLabel.description: Singular display label for the canonical concept `opportunity`. Null means use the PDC default.

opportunitiesLabel.description: Plural display label for the canonical concept `opportunity`.

applicationFormLabel.description: Singular display label for the canonical concept `applicationForm`.

applicationFormsLabel.description: Plural display label for the canonical concept `applicationForm`.

proposalLabel.description: Singular display label for the canonical concept `proposal`.

proposalsLabel.description: Plural display label for the canonical concept `proposal`.

createdBy.description: The keycloak user id of the PDC user that created this terminology set
